scenes.visualPrompt: Rain on the windshield as neon signs glow across the street
scenes.motionPrompt: slow push forward through wet city lights
scenes.voiceText: We drive through the city and everything feels alive tonight.

scenes.visualPrompt: A hidden rooftop garden above the skyline under moonlight
scenes.motionPrompt: floating crane rise with soft parallax
scenes.voiceText: Then the whole skyline opens up and the world changes in one breath.
